channel.title: Collective-Intelligence on instantiator.dev
channel.description: Recent content in Collective-Intelligence on instantiator.dev

item.title: Manage rich video experiences in your webapp like a pro
item.description: Browsers rule with an iron fist when it comes to the things your web app is allowed to do, and video playback is a complex topic. This post breaks down some advanced solutions for developers implementing embedded video.

item.title: Managing lists on BlueSky collaboratively
item.description: ListSky is a new tool for collaboratively managing lists of social accounts.
